title: derris harrowiana
intro: Derris harrowiana, also known as Derris elliptica, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain the toxic compound rotenone, a natural insecticide that has also been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Derris harrowiana include infusion, decoction, and powder, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity.
